title: Toxi
writer: Peter Francke, Robert A. Stemmle, Maria von der Osten-Sacken
actors: Elfie Fiegert, Paul Bildt, Johanna Hofer
plot: Toxi, an Afro-German girl, is left at the doorstep of the Rose family assembled for a birthday party. When they find a suitcase with Toxi, they realize that she has been abandoned.
